title: VanHijfte 2023 Protocol
author: van Hijfte, Levi
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: This dataset contains single nucleus RNA sequencing data of IDH-mutant astrocytomas from three patients. Samples were processed on the 10x genomics platform. Material from two resections has been sequenced for all three patients. Information on tumor grade and sex can be found in the metadata.
